title: Home Decor - Furniture E-commerce Website
description: A modern furniture e-commerce web application with product browsing, cart system, and smooth checkout experience.
details: Home Decor is a modern furniture e-commerce web application designed to deliver a clean and user-friendly shopping experience. Users can explore a variety of furniture items including sofas, chairs, and tables through an organized product listing interface. Each product has a dedicated details page displaying price, rating, model, and material information. The application includes a dynamic add-to-cart system where users can update product quantity in real time and view their selected items in a drawer. A fully designed checkout page allows users to place orders smoothly with form validation and interactive UI feedback. The project is built using React for component-based architecture, while Tailwind CSS and DaisyUI are used to create a responsive, visually appealing, and modern design. This project highlights strong front-end development skills, state management, and UI/UX design principles.

title: MediPlus - Doctor Appointment System
description: A professional healthcare platform for booking doctor appointments with real-time data visualization.
details: MediPlus is a comprehensive medical appointment web application designed to bridge the gap between patients and healthcare providers. The platform features a secure authentication system powered by Firebase (Email/Password & Google Login). Users can browse specialist doctor profiles, check availability, and book appointments seamlessly. It includes a dedicated 'My Bookings' dashboard where appointment data is visually represented using Chart.js for better insights. The UI is crafted with Tailwind CSS and DaisyUI, ensuring a modern, mobile-responsive, and accessible user experience.
